Background Effect Tools - OBS Studio source plugin

This distribution contains a binary build of the Background Effect Tools
plugin. The plugin is licensed under the GNU General Public License,
version 2 (see the bundled LICENSE file).

The complete corresponding source code is available from the project
repository. If you received this binary without source access, contact
the distributor listed in the plugin metadata.

Third-party components:
  - Built against libobs (OBS Studio), GPL-2.0.
